title: Enchanted Utilities
description: Makes shields, shears, flint and steel, wolf armor, and nautilus armor enchantable in the enchantment table. Adds Protection and Thorns compatibility on shields and additional compatibility on other items.
body:
### Description
Enchanted Utilities expands existing vanilla enchantments to items that would work well with those enchantments, it is extremely lightweight and perfect for vanilla+ players who feel like shields should be enchantable or find it odd that some tools are not enchantable.

It does not add enchantments of its own, only expands vanilla ones.

### Enchantable Items
- **Shields**: Compatible with Unbreaking, Protection, and Thorns.
    - Thorns also works while shield is blocking.

![Thorns on a Shield](https://i.imgur.com/61gv5KX.gif)

- **Shears**: Compatible with Unbreaking and Efficiency.

- **Flint and Steel**: Compatible with Unbreaking.

- **Wolf Armor**: Compatible with Protection, Thorns, and Unbreaking.
    - Protection works on damage sources not already blocked by the wolf armor.
    - Thorns works the same as it would on players.
    - Unbreaking causes wolf armor to take a lot more hits before breaking.
  
- **Nautilus Armor** <font color="#ff6666">(1.21.11+)</font>: Compatible with Protection and Thorns.
    - Protection works the same as it would on players.
    - Thorns works the same as it would on players.
    - Unbreaking is not needed as Nautilus Armor does not take durability damage.

### Item Changes
- **Shields**: Added a component with enchantable value of 9.
- **Shears**: Added a component with enchantable value of 9.
- **Flint and Steel**: Added a component with enchantable value of 9.
- **Wolf Armor**: Added a component with enchantable value of 9.
- **Copper Nautilus Armor** <font color="#ff6666">(1.21.11+)</font>: Added a component with enchantable value of 8.
- **Iron Nautilus Armor** <font color="#ff6666">(1.21.11+)</font>: Added a component with enchantable value of 9.
- **Golden Nautilus Armor** <font color="#ff6666">(1.21.11+)</font>: Added a component with enchantable value of 25.
- **Diamond Nautilus Armor** <font color="#ff6666">(1.21.11+)</font>: Added a component with enchantable value of 10.
- **Netherite Nautilus Armor** <font color="#ff6666">(1.21.11+)</font>: Added a component with enchantable value of 15.

### Notes
Feel free to contact me in the Discord Server if you want anything added!
https://discord.gg/Dybxpv7r
